since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.21%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.44% · BTC -0.41% · Gold -0.04% · Nasdaq100 -1.76%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.21%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.21%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.00%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -10.89%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +8.90%, WDAY +3.99%, IBM +3.72%, NOW +3.52%, INTU +3.52%. Laggards: TER -10.89%, INTC -10.61%, AMBA -10.15%, MRVL -8.85%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.85% at $151.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.85% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
